traits.locale_text: The creature gains +80% shock damage and energy damage reduction, +3 deflection, +20% armour durability, +25% damage, +25% armour penetration, +25% dodge reduction, and +1 MP.

The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} durability, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

languages.text: Существо получает +80% к снижению {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}энергетического урона{/g}, +3 к {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражению{/g}, +20% к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броне{/g}, +25% к наносимому урону, {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитию брони{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}снижению уклонения{/g} и +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g}.

languages.text: Die Kreatur erhält +80 % {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}- und {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}Energieschaden{/g}-Reduktion, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}, +20 % {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g}, +25 % Schaden, +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}, +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}Ausweichen-Reduktion{/g} und +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}.
languages.original_text: The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Die Kreatur erhält +80 % {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}- und {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}Energieschaden{/g}-Reduktion, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}, +20 % {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g}, +25 % Schaden, +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}, +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}Ausweichen-Reduktion{/g} und +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}.

languages.text: このクリーチャーは、{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}の軽減率がそれぞれ80%アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御力{/g}が3アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}アーマー{/g}が20%アップ、ダメージが25%アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}アーマー貫通率{/g}が25%アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}回避率軽減{/g}が25%アップ、そして{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}が1アップします。
languages.original_text: The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text: このクリーチャーは、{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}の軽減率がそれぞれ80%アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御力{/g}が3アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}アーマー{/g}が20%アップ、ダメージが25%アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}アーマー貫通率{/g}が25%アップ、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}回避率軽減{/g}が25%アップ、そして{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}が1アップします。
